name: canshare-who-gestational-trophoblastic-primary-histology
title: NZ WHO gestational trophoblastic primary histology
description: Histologies used for gestational trophoblastic primaries, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Female Genital Tumours (latest edition) - Sections 8. Gestational trophoblastic disease, 12. Neuroendocrine neoplasia, 14. Mesenchymal tumours of the lower genital tract, 15. Melanocytic lesions or an 'Other' value.
